Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class AspenManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.AspenManager
  • public class AspenManager
extends java.lang.Object
    The AspenManager class

    This is the main class of the Aspen library. It contains the
    available service interfaces, version, et cetera.

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean audioDeviceSupported​(int model_id)
      Returns whether an audio device is supported by APS.

      This method returns a bool indicating whether an audio device is
      supported by Aspen, given its model id.
      boolean audioDeviceSupported​(java.lang.String bredr_uuid)
      Returns whether a BR/EDR device is supported by APS.

      This method returns a bool indicating whether an audio device is
      supported by Aspen, given its BR/EDR UUID.

      Getter for the IEqualizerProfileService.

      Gets an interface to the equalizer profile service, which can be used to manage

      Gets an interface to the profile service, which can be used to manage

      int modelIdFromBredrUuid​(java.lang.String bredr_uuid)
      Converts a BR/EDR UUID to an audio device model id.

      Note: Do not pass nullptr as bredr_uuid; C++ will try to turn that
      into a std::string assuming it's a const char *, which will end badly.
      protected void reset()  
      UintVector supportedDeviceModelIds()
      Returns a vector with the supported audio device model ids.

      The method returns all of the supported audio device model ids based on
      the license key supplied at initialization of AspenManager.
      boolean supportsEqualizerProfileService()
      Returns whether the IEqualizerProfileService is supported or not.
      boolean supportsProfileService()
      Returns whether the IProfileService is supported or not.

      This method returns a bool indicating if the profile service is supported by
      the license key supplied at initialization of AspenManager.

      • getProfileService

        public IProfileService getProfileService()
        Getter for the IProfileService.

        Gets an interface to the profile service, which can be used to manage
        profiles.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the profile service.

      • getVersion

        public java.lang.String getVersion()
        Get the Aspen version.

        Returns:
        A string containing the Aspen version.

      • getBuild

        public java.lang.String getBuild()
        Get the Aspen build string.

        Returns:
        A string containing the Aspen build string.

      • supportsProfileService

        public boolean supportsProfileService()
        Returns whether the IProfileService is supported or not.

        This method returns a bool indicating if the profile service is supported by
        the license key supplied at initialization of AspenManager.

        Returns:
        True when the ProfileService is supported, false when not supported.

      • createDeviceService

        @Nullable
public IDeviceService createDeviceService​(int model_id)
        Create a IDeviceService for a specific model id.

        Parameters:
        model_id - The model id of the audio device.
        Returns:
        A pointer to an instance of a device service.

      • createVirtualDeviceService

        public IVirtualDeviceService createVirtualDeviceService​(int model_id,
                                                        IVirtualDeviceServiceCallbacks cbs)
        Create a IVirtualDeviceService for a specific model id.

        Parameters:
        model_id - The model id of the audio device.
        cbs - A reference to a IVirtualDeviceServiceCallbacks implementation.
        Returns:
        A pointer to an instance of a virtual device service.

      • audioDeviceSupported

        public boolean audioDeviceSupported​(int model_id)
        Returns whether an audio device is supported by APS.

        This method returns a bool indicating whether an audio device is
        supported by Aspen, given its model id. For audio devices using
        BLE, the model id is presented in the advertisement data.

        Parameters:
        model_id - The model id of the audio device.
        Returns:
        True when the audio device is supported by APS, false when not supported.

      • audioDeviceSupported

        public boolean audioDeviceSupported​(java.lang.String bredr_uuid)
        Returns whether a BR/EDR device is supported by APS.

        This method returns a bool indicating whether an audio device is
        supported by Aspen, given its BR/EDR UUID. This is for audio devices
        presenting themselves with BR/EDR UUID, i.e. using Bluetooth
        Classic.

        Note: Do not pass nullptr as bredr_uuid; C++ will try to
        turn that into an std::string assuming it's a const char *,
        which will end badly.

        Parameters:
        bredr_uuid - The BR/EDR UUID for the audio device.
        Returns:
        True when the audio device is supported by APS, false when not supported.

      • modelIdFromBredrUuid

        public int modelIdFromBredrUuid​(java.lang.String bredr_uuid)
        Converts a BR/EDR UUID to an audio device model id.

        Note: Do not pass nullptr as bredr_uuid; C++ will try to turn that
        into a std::string assuming it's a const char *, which will end badly.

        Parameters:
        bredr_uuid - The BR/EDR UUID for the audio device.
        Returns:
        The model id for the device if it exists, else 0.

      • supportedDeviceModelIds

        public UintVector supportedDeviceModelIds()
        Returns a vector with the supported audio device model ids.

        The method returns all of the supported audio device model ids based on
        the license key supplied at initialization of AspenManager.

        Returns:
        An array containing the supported audio device model ids.

      • supportsEqualizerProfileService

        public boolean supportsEqualizerProfileService()
        Returns whether the IEqualizerProfileService is supported or not.

        Returns:
        True when the EqualizerProfileService is supported, false when not supported.

      • getEqualizerProfileService

        public IEqualizerProfileService getEqualizerProfileService()
        Getter for the IEqualizerProfileService.

        Gets an interface to the equalizer profile service, which can be used to manage
        equalizer profiles.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the equalizer profiler service.

      • reset

        protected void reset()
